---
title: "quarto-revealjs-tldraw"
subtitle: "Draw on your slides with tldraw"
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1280
    height: 720
revealjs-plugins:
  - tldraw
---

## Usage

Activate drawing mode with **T** or via ☰ → Tools → Toggle Drawing.

- Drawings are per-slide and persist in `localStorage`
- Press **Escape** or **T** again to return to navigation

## Second Slide

Each slide has its own drawing layer.
